abstract: Structured intelligence-gathering skill for any non-company topic. Covers 7 topic types (MKT, POL, SCI, TEC, GEO, TRD, PRS) with module-specific phases, source registers, expert panels, analytical frameworks, and output templates. v2.1.0 adds dependency check for fact-check-workflow, literature-review, document-skills:pdf, data-visualization, and expert-panel. v2.0.0 added anti-hallucination enforcement: Cite-Before-You-Write, Numeric Quarantine, Fabrication Detection Pass (12-flag checklist), SCI Citation Manifest, POL Verbatim Provision Rule, Module Contamination Firewall. Integrates fact-check-workflow, literature-review, document-skills:pdf, and data-visualization. Includes OSINT techniques, agent dispatch guidance, multi-module chaining, and Refresh Investigation protocol.
